project: Scooby-Doo! Night of 100 Frights — Native PC Port (GameCube Recomp)
headline: Long-session stability: real async load completions (deep-UAF ceiling broken, 18-22k+ frames no crash)

milestones.name: Game extracted (RVZ -> DOL + 329 asset files)
main.dol statically recompiled (0 unknown instructions)
Runtime harness: DOL loads, recompiled code executes
Hardware init survives (PI / DSP / ARAM / AI mailboxes)
OS threading + interrupt delivery (retrace, wakeups)
DVD/DI serving: inquiry + real file reads from disc image
Engine type-registry boot (bss-loader root-cause fix)
VI framebuffer presented in a host window (first pixels)
GX software rasterizer: 2D UI renders (textures + CI4/CI8)
SI controller detected (transfer buffer + SI interrupt)
Memory-card dialog advances (input gate cracked)
Post-dialog level/world data streams from disc
World loads: RenderWare models instantiate (chars/powerups)
Post-load scene begins rendering (loading UI + sky)
3D intro scene renders natively (Scooby on screen!)
Intro cutscene plays (gang animated, Z-buffer, blending)
TITLE SCREEN renders (logo + 3D haunted house)
First level loads + world renders in-game (h001)
In-level crash fixed: level renders indefinitely (UAF)
Intro cutscene plays to completion (Bink FMV end-to-end, frames visible)
PLAYABLE: control unlocks after the cutscene; Scooby walks under input
Playable at correct real speed (wall-clock timebase, 50Hz vblank)
Hub world renders textured with the correct 3rd-person camera (BSP walk + main-camera capture)
Stable level transitions: real async load completions (hub <-> areas, no dual-world hangs)
Characters/entities render complete, incl. skinned animation (Scooby walks visibly)
Compositing correct: flicker-free presents, effects (lightning), texture-streaming residency
HUD + 2D text render correctly (currently mirrored/garbled)
Title screen menu interactive (input-driven)
Full input path (SDK SI/PAD poll driven by the game itself)
All levels load + render verified (full world tour)
Framerate: hold native 25fps everywhere, then a 60fps mode
Modern resolutions (internal render scale, window/fullscreen)
Saves persist (memory-card emulation end-to-end)
Audio (DSP-HLE / music + SFX) — LAST per user preference
Long-session stability: real async load completions (deep-UAF ceiling broken, 18-22k+ frames no crash)
Packaging: clean user-supplied-disc flow, no game assets shipped

subsystems.name: OS threading / interrupts
subsystems.notes: retrace emulation, thread wakeups, DI/SI delivery

subsystems.name: DVD / DI
subsystems.notes: inquiry + real file reads; completion timing tuned

subsystems.name: VI (video out)
subsystems.notes: framebuffer blit to a host window each vsync

subsystems.name: GX (GPU)
subsystems.notes: software rasterizer renders 3D level scenes; lighting/TEV polish pending

subsystems.name: SI (controllers)
subsystems.notes: host keyboard drives gameplay (engine-level inject); SDK poll path pending

subsystems.name: EXI / memory card
subsystems.notes: "no card" path works; saving not implemented

subsystems.name: DSP / AI (audio)
subsystems.notes: mailbox HLE only; no sound yet
